allow: PowerShell($basePath = "i:\\repos\\RaidOps.Front\\src\\app"; Get-ChildItem -Path $basePath -Recurse -Directory | Sort-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $rel = $_.FullName -replace [regex]::Escape\($basePath\), ""; Write-Output \("." + $rel\) })

PowerShell($basePath = "i:\\repos\\RaidOps.Front\\src\\app"; Get-ChildItem -Path $basePath -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Directory.FullName -ne $basePath } | Sort-Object Directory, Name | ForEach-Object { $rel = $_.FullName -replace [regex]::Escape\($basePath\), ""; Write-Output $rel })

PowerShell(@\("core\\interceptors", "core\\models", "core\\services", "features\\guilds\\components", "shared\\directives"\) | ForEach-Object { $dir = "i:\\repos\\RaidOps.Front\\src\\app\\$_"; $files = Get-ChildItem -Path $dir -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($files\) { Write-Output "=== $_ ==="; $files | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.Name } } })
